test_sufficiency_summary: Adequate for TBSCPP-001 acceptance: verifier reruns matched tester evidence (3 expected stale tactical source-contract failures, 6 unrelated GUI baseline failures), existing live GUI tests prove the non-modal close vectors and modal menu-quit unwind, and modal title-bar unwind is supported by the shared FBattleScreen close path implementation.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: FBattleScreen header docs, DesignNotes, and AGENTS now describe the shared Close(true) -> onClose(...) -> closeBattleScreen(...) lifecycle, non-modal Hide-before-Destroy behavior, modal EndModal(...) unwind, and screen-owned close guard without stale FTacticalGame ownership claims.
